# SearchClaw API — Full Reference
> Search, Extract, Crawl — One API for AI agents.

## Docs
- [API Reference](https://api.searchclaw.dev/docs): Interactive API documentation
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://api.searchclaw.dev/openapi.json): Machine-readable API spec

---

## POST /v1/search
Web search via SearXNG. Returns ranked results from multiple engines.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "q": "string (required, 1-500 chars)",
  "categories": ["general"],
  "engines": ["google", "bing"],
  "language": "en",
  "region": "US",
  "count": 10,
  "offset": 0
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "query": "string",
  "results": [
    {
      "title": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "snippet": "string",
      "source": "string",
      "position": 1
    }
  ],
  "infobox": null,
  "suggestions": ["string"],
  "meta": {
    "total_results": 10,
    "cached": false,
    "response_time_ms": 150,
    "engines_used": ["google", "bing"]
  }
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/search/news
News search. Same request/response format as /v1/search with category fixed to "news".

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/search/images
Image search. Same request format as /v1/search with category fixed to "images".

**Response results include:** `img_src`, `thumbnail`, `resolution` fields.

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## GET /v1/suggest
Autocomplete suggestions for a query prefix.

**Query params:** `q` (string, required)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "query": "string",
  "suggestions": ["string"]
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/extract
Schema-driven structured data extraction from a URL. Uses a 3-tier pipeline: rule-based → LLM → validation.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com (required)",
  "schema": {"name": "string", "price": "number"},
  "prompt": "optional extraction guidance",
  "timeout_ms": 30000
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "url": "string",
  "data": {"name": "Example", "price": 9.99},
  "meta": {
    "extraction_method": "rule|llm|fallback",
    "response_time_ms": 1200,
    "cached": false
  }
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/markdown
Convert a URL to clean markdown text.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com (required)",
  "include_images": true,
  "include_links": true,
  "main_content_only": true
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "url": "string",
  "title": "string",
  "markdown": "# Page Title\n\nContent...",
  "meta": {
    "response_time_ms": 800,
    "cached": false
  }
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/screenshot
Capture a screenshot of a URL.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com (required)",
  "format": "png|jpeg",
  "width": 1280,
  "height": 720,
  "full_page": false,
  "quality": 80
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "url": "string",
  "format": "png",
  "image_base64": "base64-encoded-image",
  "meta": {
    "response_time_ms": 2000,
    "cached": false
  }
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## POST /v1/crawl
Start an async multi-page crawl job. Returns a job ID for polling.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/list (required)",
  "schema": {"title": "string", "price": "number"},
  "prompt": "optional extraction guidance",
  "list_selector": "CSS selector for list items",
  "pagination": {
    "type": "next_button|url_pattern|infinite_scroll",
    "selector": ".next-page",
    "pattern": "/page/{page}",
    "max_pages": 10
  },
  "max_items": 100,
  "timeout_ms": 60000,
  "webhook_url": "https://your-server.com/webhook (optional, HTTPS)",
  "webhook_secret": "your-secret (optional, for HMAC signing)"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "job_id": "job_abc123def456",
  "status": "processing",
  "poll_url": "/v1/jobs/job_abc123def456"
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit per page crawled

---

## GET /v1/jobs/{id}
Poll the status of an async crawl job.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "job_id": "string",
  "status": "queued|processing|completed|failed|partial",
  "progress": {
    "pages_crawled": 5,
    "total_pages": 10,
    "items_extracted": 47
  },
  "data": [{"title": "...", "price": 9.99}],
  "error": null,
  "meta": {
    "duration_ms": 15000,
    "credits_used": 5
  }
}
```

---

## POST /v1/pipeline
Search + extract in a single call. Searches the web, then extracts structured data from top results.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "query": "string (required, 1-500 chars)",
  "schema": {"name": "string", "rating": "number"},
  "max_results": 10,
  "extract_from": 5,
  "search_params": {
    "engines": ["google", "bing"],
    "language": "en",
    "region": "US"
  },
  "timeout": 30,
  "webhook_url": "https://your-server.com/webhook (optional, HTTPS)"
}
```

**Response (sync):**
```json
{
  "query": "string",
  "results": [
    {
      "url": "string",
      "title": "string",
      "extracted_data": {"name": "...", "rating": 4.5},
      "error": null
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "search_credits": 1,
    "extract_credits": 5,
    "total_credits": 6,
    "response_time_ms": 8000
  }
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit (search) + 1 credit per successful extraction

---

## POST /v1/map
Discover all URLs on a domain. Returns a sitemap of discovered links.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com (required)",
  "max_depth": 3,
  "max_urls": 100
}
```

**Cost:** 1 credit

---

## Auth
All endpoints require an API key passed in the `X-API-Key` header.

- **Register:** POST /v1/auth/register `{"email": "...", "password": "..."}`
- **Get API key:** POST /v1/auth/keys (requires authentication)
- **Key format:** `sc_live_...` (production) or `sc_test_...` (sandbox)

## Pricing
| Plan    | Price    | Credits/mo |
|---------|----------|------------|
| Free    | $0       | 1,000      |
| Starter | $10/mo   | 15,000     |
| Pro     | $50/mo   | 100,000    |
| Scale   | $200/mo  | 500,000    |

All endpoints cost 1 credit each. Crawl costs 1 credit per page.

## Webhook Delivery
When `webhook_url` is provided on crawl or pipeline requests, results are POSTed to your URL on completion.

**Headers:**
- `Content-Type: application/json`
- `X-SearchClaw-Signature: sha256=<HMAC-SHA256>` (when webhook_secret provided)
- `X-SearchClaw-Event: job.completed | job.failed`
- `X-SearchClaw-Job-Id: <job_id>`
- `User-Agent: SearchClaw-Webhook/1.0`

**Retry policy:** 3 attempts with exponential backoff (1s, 5s, 25s).
